name: ip-api Geolocation API
description: IP geolocation API that provides location, ISP, and network information for IP addresses and domains. Free for non-commercial use with no API key required. Supports JSON, XML, CSV, and newline response formats. Data includes country, region, city, coordinates, timezone, ISP, organization, AS number, proxy/VPN detection, and more.
